code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(cur)
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    if v > 0
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("positive=#{count}")
